name: EventHandler Validation - Group 5 (20 types)
description: Test all Group 5 EventHandler types: Rally through SpawnGore

steps.name: Group 5 - Test all 20 EventHandler types
steps.code: var results = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, bool>(); var types = new[] { "Rally", "RecallTarget", "ReduceArmor", "RefillAmmo", "RefillSquaddies", "Regeneration", "RemoveDefect", "RemoveSkill", "ReportAmmoToAnimator", "RestoreArmorDurability", "ReturnOfServe", "Scanner", "SetAnimatorBool", "SetAnimatorTrigger", "SetEntityFlag", "SetUsesPerElement", "ShowHUDIcon", "ShowUnitHUDIcon", "SpawnEntity", "SpawnGore" }; var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); foreach (var typeName in types) { var found = false; foreach (var skill in skills) { try { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.ReadString("name"), "EventHandlers"); if (handlers != null) { var array = handlers.Cast<Il2CppSystem.Object[]>(); foreach (var handler in array) { var type = handler.ReadString("_type"); if (type == typeName) { found = true; break; } } if (found) break; } } catch { } } if (!found) { foreach (var perk in perks) { try { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", perk.ReadString("name"), "EventHandlers"); if (handlers != null) { var array = handlers.Cast<Il2CppSystem.Object[]>(); foreach (var handler in array) { var type = handler.ReadString("_type"); if (type == typeName) { found = true; break; } } if (found) break; } } catch { } } } results[typeName] = found; } var passed = results.Values.Count(v => v); var total = results.Count; UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Group 5 Results: {passed}/{total} types found"); foreach (var kvp in results) { UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"  {kvp.Key}: {(kvp.Value ? "✓" : "✗")}"); } passed == total
